mapper.select: SELECT * FROM departments ORDER BY sort_order, created_at

SELECT * FROM departments
parent_id = #{parentId}
parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_order, created_at
SELECT * FROM departments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (id, name, parent_id, leader_id, sort_order, level, member_count, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{parentId}, #{leaderId}, #{sortOrder}, #{level}, #{memberCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET member_count = #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM departments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} UNION ALL SELECT d.id FROM departments d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id ) SELECT id FROM dept_tree
